PowerShell($psql = "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\11\\bin\\psql.exe"; $env:PGPASSWORD = "PnCdEL"; & $psql -U postgres -p 5411 -d fisioclinic -c "SELECT id, nome, email, perfil, ativo, senha_hash IS NOT NULL AS tem_senha FROM fisioterapeutas;" 2>&1)
PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = "PnCdEL"; $psql = "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\11\\bin\\psql.exe"; & $psql -U postgres -p 5411 -d fisioclinic -c "SELECT id, nome, tipo FROM salas;" 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = "PnCdEL"; $psql = "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\11\\bin\\psql.exe"; & $psql -U postgres -p 5411 -d fisioclinic -c "SELECT nome, email, perfil, ativo, senha_hash IS NOT NULL AS tem_senha, LENGTH\(senha_hash\) AS len_hash FROM fisioterapeutas;" 2>&1)

PowerShell($login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"admin@fisioclinic.com","senha":"admin123"}' -UseBasicParsing; $token = $login.token; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token" }; $pacientes = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/pacientes" -Headers $headers -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "Pacientes: $\($pacientes.Count\)"; $pacienteId = $pacientes[0].id; Write-Output "ID paciente teste: $pacienteId")

PowerShell($login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"admin@fisioclinic.com","senha":"admin123"}' -UseBasicParsing; $token = $login.token; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token"; "Content-Type" = "application/json" }; $pacienteId = "2db90cf5-b4eb-4837-b3b7-f5dc6241152e"; $listaPlanos = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/planos?paciente_id=$pacienteId" -Headers $headers -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "GET /api/planos - HTTP 200 OK - Planos: $\($listaPlanos.Count\)")
